Bug / Task Description: Binary operators of equal precedence are grouped the wrong way in the precedence-climbing parser (parseBinaryExpr, pkg/parser/parser.go): a chain like `a - b - c` or `a + b - c` is parsed so the rightmost operator becomes the top of the tree instead of the leftmost. This changes the AST shape and evaluation order for arithmetic and logical chains, while single-operator and parenthesized expressions still parse correctly. Restore left-associative grouping.
